pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products, Version 2.0.1 (2025-06-05); c-PCR-003 Concrete and Concrete Elements (2025-04-08)
scope: Cradle to gate (A1-A3) with options, modules A4-A5, C1-C4, D
notes: Product stage reported combined only (A1-A3 = 237); p9 module table marks A1/A2/A3 as declared (X) but no individual split is given anywhere in the doc → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.

GWP-Total, GWP-Fossil, and GWP-GHG (p16-17) are numerically identical across every module (e.g. A1-A3 = 237 for all three) despite non-zero biogenic (0.605) and luluc (0.0291) contributions — the same artifact noted in sibling Holcim EPDs (e.g. IES-0029695); GWP-Total (row 'GWP-Total') used here as the canonical +A2 figure.

C4 (final disposal) GWP = 0 is a printed zero, not ND — C4 does model a physical inert-waste-landfill mass flow of 480 kg (p13, since Module D assumes a 100% recycling scenario per PCR 2.0.1 requirements), so the mass flow exists but carries no attributed GWP impact in the results table.

compressive_strength.standard: the document gives only generic AS 1379 normal-/special-class definitions (p5) and never explicitly labels QX25MOR/GEOStone as one or the other. The 'S25' prefix in the mix description ('S25 MORETON GEOSTONE') follows the same naming convention as special-class grades in sibling Holcim EPDs (e.g. IES-0029695's S25/20/100), but this class attribution is inferred, not stated, for this specific mix — recorded as 'AS 1379' without a class qualifier.
Full registration: EPD-IES-0014327:002 (revision 2) — revision history (p3) notes 'Update of mix designs and addition of new mixes'.
Source capitalization inconsistency: the product line is rendered 'GEOStone' on the title page (p1) but 'GEOSTONE' (all caps) in the mix description table (p10) — both verbatim from source.
Total energy use omitted — source reports PERT (52.0 MJ) and PENRT (1336 MJ) separately at A1-A3 (p16), no single combined figure.
gwp_a1a3_alt (+A1/CML = 241, p18) differs from the +A2 GWP-Total (237) and is retained only to drive a 'not comparable' warning against the canonical +A2 figure.
